Tamilnad Mercantile Bank (TMB) Agricultural Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online

Tamilnad Mercantile Bank Ltd. (TMB) has released the recruitment of Agricultural Officer on regular basis. Online applications are invited from Indian citizens with Graduation / Degree in Agriculture or allied subjects. Apply online between 22-05-2026 and 06-06-2026 via the TMB Careers portal.

Apply Online at: https://www.ib.tmbonline.bank.in/tmb_careers/

TMB Agricultural Officer Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process

The selection process for TMB Agricultural Officer consists of the following stages:

Stage 1: Shortlisting Applications will be scrutinized based on educational qualifications, experience, and other eligibility parameters. Only shortlisted candidates will be called for the next stage.

Stage 2: Personal Interview Shortlisted candidates will be called for a Personal Interview either in person (Direct) or through Video Conferencing. The interview will assess domain knowledge in agriculture, banking awareness, communication skills, rural banking exposure, and overall suitability for the role. Candidates will be informed individually via email / post regarding the interview schedule.

Stage 3: Document Verification & Medical Examination Final selection is subject to verification of all original documents, experience certificates, and being declared medically fit as per the bank's standards.

Roles & Responsibilities of Agricultural Officer (Detailed)

  1. Promoting modern agricultural practices and technologies among farmers by providing suitable financial products and incentives.
  2. Educating and guiding farmers regarding various central and state government subsidies, grants, crop insurance schemes, and support programs.
  3. Conducting detailed assessment and appraisal of agricultural loan proposals including crop loans, term loans for farm equipment, dairy projects, Kisan Credit Cards, and agri-business ventures.
  4. Performing comprehensive risk evaluation of agricultural advances by analyzing crop patterns, weather data, soil health, market trends, and other relevant factors.
  5. Organizing regular awareness camps, farmer meets, and financial literacy programs in rural areas.
  6. Serving as the key liaison officer between the bank and the rural farming community to understand their evolving needs and expectations.
  7. Keeping abreast of latest NABARD guidelines, RBI directives, PM-KISAN, and other government schemes related to agriculture.
  8. Monitoring and follow-up of agricultural loan accounts to ensure timely repayment and reduce NPA levels.
  9. Any other duties and responsibilities assigned by the Bank from time to time.

Who Should Apply for TMB Agricultural Officer Post?

  • Agriculture graduates with strong academic records and minimum 3 years hands-on experience in agri-finance.
  • Candidates passionate about rural development and agricultural banking.
  • Professionals seeking a stable career in a growing private sector bank with good work-life balance in many locations.

Also Read: UPSC CDS 2 Examination 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 451 Combined Defence Services Posts

Who Should NOT Apply?

  • Fresh graduates without the mandatory 3 years experience.
  • Candidates above the maximum age limit.
  • Those not willing to work in rural areas or accept transfers.
  • Applicants with poor credit history or pending disciplinary cases in previous employment.

Common Mistakes to Avoid While Applying

  • Uploading low-quality or incorrect photographs and signatures.
  • Not uploading complete experience documents.
  • Entering incorrect email ID or mobile number.
  • Submitting the application without previewing details.
  • Applying without reading the full advertisement.

How to Apply for TMB Agricultural Officer Recruitment 2026

  1. Visit the official career portal: www.ib.tmbonline.bank.in/tmb_careers/
  2. Click on the link for “Recruitment Advertisement – Agricultural Officer” and download the detailed advertisement.
  3. Ensure you meet all eligibility criteria before proceeding.
  4. Click on “Apply Online” and register using a valid email ID and mobile number.
  5. After registration, you will receive an activation link on email and credentials on mobile.
  6. Login using the Registration Number / Username and Password.
  7. Fill all personal, educational, and experience details carefully.
  8. Upload scanned copies of required documents within the prescribed size limits.
  9. Verify the preview of the application and submit.
  10. Take a printout of the final submitted application for future reference.

Documents to be Uploaded:

  • Recent passport-size photograph (390×520 pixels, max 120 KB)
  • Signature (240×240 pixels, max 60 KB)
  • SSLC / Higher Secondary Mark Sheet for age proof
  • All Degree Certificates and Mark Sheets
  • Experience Certificates from previous employers
  • Relieving Letters
  • Latest Salary Slip

Important Instructions for Candidates

  • This is regular employment with all benefits applicable to Scale-I Officers.
  • Selected candidates are liable to be transferred anywhere in India.
  • Canvassing in any form will result in immediate disqualification.
  • The Bank reserves the right to reject any application at any stage without assigning reasons.
  • All disputes shall be subject to the jurisdiction of courts in Tamil Nadu only.

Key Highlights

  • Vacancy: DRDO RAC is recruiting 33 Scientists (Scientist E, D & C) under the DRDO/DRDS cadre through the Lateral Recruitment Scheme.
  • Qualification: First Division B.E./B.Tech, M.Sc., M.Pharmacy, MBBS/MD, or equivalent in relevant disciplines with 3–11 years of experience depending on the post.
  • Last Date: Online applications can be submitted until 19 June 2026 (4:00 PM).
  • Salary: Basic Pay ranges from ₹67,700 (Scientist C) to ₹1,23,100 (Scientist E) under the 7th CPC Pay Matrix.
  • Selection: Administrative Screening → Technical Screening → Personal Interview. Candidates must secure 75% marks in the final interview for selection.
  • Job Type: Regular Government Job under DRDO/DRDS cadre.
  • Apply Mode: Online only through the RAC recruitment portal.

Defence Research and Development Organisation Recruitment & Assessment Centre (DRDO RAC) has officially released the Scientist Recruitment 2026 notification (Advt. No. 157) for multiple vacancies across Scientist E, Scientist D, and Scientist C positions under the Defence Research & Development Service (DRDS) cadre. Eligible engineering and science professionals meeting the prescribed educational qualifications and experience requirements can apply online from 30 May 2026 to 19 June 2026 through the RAC recruitment portal. Selected candidates will be appointed on a regular permanent basis under the Lateral Recruitment Scheme with basic pay ranging from ₹67,700 to ₹1,23,100 per month under Pay Levels 11, 12, and 13, along with applicable allowances.

FOLLOW US

DRDO RAC Scientist Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

Recruitment & Assessment Centre (RAC), Lucknow Road, Timarpur, Delhi – 110054 has officially released Advertisement No. 157 for Direct Recruitment of Scientists in DRDO cadre (Scientist E, Scientist D, Scientist C) and Encadered posts in DRDS cadre under Lateral Recruitment Scheme. The notification includes complete details on subject/discipline-wise vacancies, essential and desirable qualifications, experience requirements, age limit, application fee, selection process, and general instructions. Candidates are strongly advised to read the full notification before applying.

  • Download DRDO RAC Scientist Recruitment 2026 Official Notification PDF

DRDO RAC Scientist Recruitment 2026 Overview

DRDO RAC is recruiting Scientists (Scientist E, D, and C) across multiple engineering and science disciplines on regular basis under Lateral Recruitment Scheme, closing date 19 June 2026.

Organization Name Defence Research and Development Organisation (DRDO), Recruitment & Assessment Centre (RAC), Lucknow Road, Timarpur, Delhi – 110054
Advertisement No. Advt. No. 157
Post Names Scientist E (Basic Pay: Rs. 1,23,100/-, Level 13), Scientist D (Basic Pay: Rs. 78,800/-, Level 12), Scientist C (Basic Pay: Rs. 67,700/-, Level 11)
Recruitment Type Direct Recruitment on Regular basis under Lateral Recruitment Scheme
Cadre DRDS (Defence Research & Development Service) cadre and Encadered posts
Application Mode Online only via https://rac.gov.in
Selection Mode Administrative Screening → Technical Screening (Level-1 & Level-2 if required) → Final Personal Interview (in-person at RAC, Delhi)
Minimum Score for Final Selection 75% marks (75 out of 100) in Final Personal Interview
Official Website https://rac.gov.in
Career Progression Excellent opportunities under Flexible Complimenting Scheme (FCS); merit-based promotion without vacancy linkage

DRDO RAC Scientist Recruitment 2026 Important Dates

DRDO RAC Scientist Recruitment 2026 - Vacancy Details

Vacancies are announced under two sections: (1) Regular posts in DRDS cadre and (2) Encadered posts in DRDS cadre. All above-mentioned vacancies are Unreserved (UR). (@) marked posts allow candidates from specific Divyang/PwD categories (Acid Attack Victims and Dwarfism only). (*) marked posts allow candidates from all Divyang/PwD categories except Blindness, low vision, Autism, Intellectual disability, Specific Learning disability and Mental Illness.

(Pharmacology) + Minimum 3 years' experience in Immuno Pharmacology / Formulation design and development / Medicinal chemistry / natural product chemistry / drug designing. DRDO RAC Scientist Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria

Only Indian Nationals can apply. The date for determining the eligibility of all candidates in every respect shall be the prescribed Closing Date (19 June 2026). First Division means 60% marks; where CGPA/CPI of 6.75 on a 10-point scale will be taken as equivalent to 60% as per AICTE guidelines. No rounding off of marks is permitted.

Criteria Details
Essential Academic Qualification At least First Division Bachelor's Degree in Engineering/Technology in the relevant discipline OR First Division Master's Degree in the relevant discipline from a recognized University. (As detailed post-wise above)
Experience Post-qualification experience only (experience counted only after passing the essential qualification). Scientist E: 11 years; Scientist D: 7 years; Scientist C: 3 years (as on closing date). Experience below Pay Level 10 as per 7th CPC or equivalent will not be considered.
CCA Declaration / NOC All serving candidates in Government/PSU/Government-promoted companies (with 50% or more controlling stake) must upload a signed CCA Declaration at time of online submission. NOC from Cadre Controlling Authority (CCA) is mandatory at time of Final Personal Interview.
Weightage for Higher Qualification Post Graduate Qualification in Engineering: 2 years; PG Degree in Medicine/Physiology (Medical Post only): 3 years; Doctorate Degree in Science: 3 years; PhD in Pharmacy: 3 years; PhD in Engineering: 4 years. (Only if in the relevant discipline and acquired before closing date; period of study must not overlap with work experience.)
Pay Equivalence (Private Sector) Candidates from Private Sector must submit proof of Pay drawn/Cost to Company (CTC)/CTC revision document/Form 16A during the period claimed as experience. Pay drawn/CTC/Form 16A will be the sole criteria. For details visit RAC website and check 'Pay Equivalence Criteria'.
Nationality Indian Nationals only

DRDO RAC Scientist Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit

Age limit is as on the closing date of advertisement (19 June 2026). Maximum age shall not exceed 56 years including any relaxation. For Scientist C (Encadered posts) – there is no age relaxation under reserved categories.

Category Age Limit / Relaxation
Scientist D / E Not exceeding 45 years
Scientist C Not exceeding 35 years
Divyang / PwD candidates Relaxable up to 10 years
Civilian Central Govt. Employees (with at least 3 years' continuous service on regular basis in same line or allied cadres) Relaxable up to 5 years
Ex-Servicemen (including Ex SSCOs/ECOs) Relaxable as per rules in vogue
Maximum age ceiling 56 years (including all relaxations)

DRDO RAC Scientist Recruitment 2026 - Application Fee

Application fee is non-refundable and non-transferable, payable online only.

Category Application Fee
General / OBC / EWS male candidates Rs. 100/- (Rs. One Hundred only)
SC / ST / Divyang / Women candidates NIL (No application fee)

DRDO RAC Scientist Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process

Screening of received applications will be carried out at multiple stages. Final selection is purely based on merit of marks scored in the Final Personal Interview.

Stage 1 – Administrative Screening: Verification of identity, age, essential & higher qualifications, length of suitable experience and CCA Declaration (wherever applicable).

Stage 2 – Technical Screening (Level-1): For all Administratively Eligible candidates - Technical Screening by holding a Meeting of Technical Screening Committee (an independent body including Technical Experts from Industry/Academia/DRDO other than RAC) using Bio-data based Technical Screening at Level-1 by: (a) Relevance of suitable experience w.r.t. advertised qualifications; (b) Relevance of Desirable/Higher Qualification; (c) Any other criteria suggested by Technical Screening Committee. Predefined Ratio for Preliminary Online Interview: Up to 24 candidates for 1 post; up to 48 candidates for 2 posts.

Stage 3 – Technical Screening (Level-2 / Preliminary Online Interview, if required): If number shortlisted for Final Personal Interview is large, further shortlisting via Preliminary Online Interview of short duration (10–15 minutes). Predefined Ratio for Final Personal Interview: Up to 12 candidates for 1 post; up to 24 candidates for 2 posts.

Stage 4 – Final Personal Interview (in-person at RAC, Delhi): Final selection is purely on merit of marks scored. Candidates must score a minimum of 75% marks (75 out of 100) in the Final Personal Interview for consideration for selection. The Final Personal Interview will be held in-person only before the Selection Board at RAC, Delhi on the scheduled date - no online/virtual interview will be considered.

Note: If administrative screening does not result in minimum 6 eligible candidates against one vacancy, the subsequent selection process for that vacancy may be cancelled. If technical screening does not result in minimum 6 candidates per vacancy for Final Personal Interview, the number of vacancies will be reduced accordingly.

Competition Level Analysis for DRDO RAC Scientist Recruitment 2026

The competition level for DRDO RAC Scientist Recruitment 2026 is expected to be very high, particularly for Scientist C posts in Electronics & Communication Engineering, Computer Science & Engineering, and Mechanical Engineering - disciplines with a large pool of eligible candidates and growing interest in DRDO's prestigious research environment. DRDO provides one of the best career growth structures for scientists under the Flexible Complimenting Scheme (FCS), making it a highly sought-after employer.

The multi-stage shortlisting process (Administrative → Technical Level-1 → Level-2/Preliminary Online Interview → Final Personal Interview in Delhi) is rigorous. Only up to 12 candidates per vacancy reach the Final Personal Interview, and even among those, a minimum of 75% marks in the interview is mandatory for selection. For Scientist D and E posts requiring 7–11 years of experience, the competition narrows to experienced professionals, but the specificity of required experience (e.g., Optics/Photonics, Radiation Physics, Chemical Engineering for underwater applications) naturally limits the eligible pool, making those posts relatively less competitive. Niche posts like Oceanography, Pharmacology, and Remote Sensing will see very limited candidates, improving selection chances for well-qualified applicants.

Who should NOT apply for DRDO RAC Scientist Recruitment 2026?

  • Candidates who do not have First Division (60%+) in the essential qualifying degree - this is a hard minimum requirement and no rounding off is permitted.
  • Candidates with experience below Pay Level 10 (7th CPC) or equivalent - such experience will not be counted for computing the required years of experience.
  • Candidates whose period of study (higher qualification like PhD) overlaps with the work experience claimed - overlapping periods will be removed from total experience.
  • Candidates applying for Scientist D or E posts who are currently unemployed for more than one year - under current employment, the period of un-employment shall not exceed one year, else the candidature will be rejected.
  • Candidates serving in Government/PSU who do not upload a signed CCA Declaration - without CCA Declaration their candidature will be rejected, and NOC will be mandatory at Final Personal Interview.
  • Candidates from Private Sector who cannot produce CTC/Pay drawn proof/Form 16A for the claimed experience period - this is the sole criteria for establishing experience suitability from private sector.
  • Candidates exceeding the maximum age of 35 years (Scientist C), 45 years (Scientist D/E), or 56 years inclusive of all relaxations.
  • Candidates who cannot attend the Final Personal Interview in-person at RAC, Delhi - no online/virtual mode is available for Final Personal Interview under any circumstances.
  • Candidates who do not meet the specific work experience fields mentioned in the advertised qualifications - the Technical Screening Committee assesses relevance of experience very strictly.
  • Candidates applying for Scientist C (Encadered) posts from Reserved categories seeking age relaxation - there is no category-based age relaxation for Scientist C Encadered posts.

Common mistakes / What to check before applying for DRDO RAC Scientist Recruitment 2026?

  • Not checking whether your experience is at or above Pay Level 10 (7th CPC) equivalent - experience below this level is invalid and will not be counted.
  • Miscounting experience years by including the period of higher qualification (PhD/M.Tech) that overlaps with work experience - the overlapping period will be deducted.
  • Applying for multiple posts by submitting one application - candidates applying for more than one post must apply separately for each post and mention item numbers of all other posts where they have applied, along with the order of preference.
  • Not highlighting desirable qualifications and experience in the Justification column under 'Other Section' in the online application form - this is crucial for Technical Screening Committee's assessment.
  • Providing incorrect or non-verifiable experience details - the length of experience (date of joining along with Pay Scale/CTC and end date of each employment) should be available in attached experience documents.
  • Not getting experience certificates issued by Admin/HR Head/Director/Principal/Dean/Registrar/Competent Authority - certificates issued by Group Head/Division Head/Project Head/Professor or Head of Department are not acceptable.
  • Not converting CGPA to percentage before applying - CGPA/CPI of 6.75 on a 10-point scale equals 60%; candidates must provide conversion formula certificate from the university.
  • Changing registered mobile number or email after application - vital information will be communicated only to the registered contact; applicants are advised not to change these.
  • Locking/submitting the application without previewing it along with uploaded documents - no correction in data/application will be allowed and no document will be accepted once the application is finally submitted/locked.
  • Uploading documents in language other than English or Hindi without a notarized/certified transcript - all certificates in other languages must be accompanied by notarized transcripts.

How to Apply for DRDO RAC Scientist Recruitment 2026

Candidates shall apply online through the RAC website (https://rac.gov.in) for filling the online application form. Applications received through any other mode will not be entertained. On successful registration, candidates may login and submit the online application before the closing date to avoid last minute network congestion. Only locked/finalised applications in all respects shall be considered. No correction in the data/application will be allowed and no document will be accepted once the application is finally submitted/locked.

Candidates should retain a printout/copy of the online application (.pdf format) after submission.

Important: ESSENTIAL ELIGIBILITY DOCUMENTS INCLUDING PROOFS FOR DATE OF BIRTH / ESSENTIAL QUALIFICATION / CCA DECLARATION (IF APPLICABLE) WILL NOT BE ACCEPTED AT ANY STAGE AFTER ADVERTISEMENT CLOSING DATE.

Documents Required at time of Interview (Originals + Copies):

  • Date of Birth (DOB) proof - Self attested Matriculation / High School certificate / Birth Certificate
  • A recent passport size colour photograph (not exceeding 30 KB)
  • Scanned sample of candidate's signature (not exceeding 30 KB)
  • Self-attested degree certificates/testimonials regarding Essential and Higher qualification along with mark-sheets
  • Fellowship proofs mentioning start date and end date of fellowship (if applicable)
  • Duly signed CCA Declaration (if applicable)
  • Notarized affidavit in support (if name mismatch in documents)
  • Notarized/certified transcript if documents are in language other than English or Hindi
  • All experience certificates (with start and end date) and salary Proofs / Appointment letter (with pay scale or CTC), Promotion letters (with revised scales or CTC), Form 16A and Salary slips (beginning and end of each employment)
  • Requisite caste / disability certificate (for SC/ST/Divyang – for fee waiver only)
  • Requisite Release certificate (if retired Armed Forces personnel)
  • CCA Declaration (applicable) and NOC at Final Personal Interview stage

Apply Online at: https://rac.gov.in

For queries: Phone 011-23889578 or email at [email protected] (for applying online); Phone 011-23889529 or email at [email protected] (for other queries).

Important Instructions for DRDO RAC Scientist Recruitment 2026 Candidates

  • All candidates must apply online through https://rac.gov.in only. No other mode of application is accepted.
  • Closing Date: 19 June 2026 (1600 hrs.) - facility for online application submission will remain available on RAC website only up to this time.
  • Do not divulge any confidential information related to work experience of present or previous employer while filling the application; RAC shall not be held responsible for revelation of such information.
  • Ensure candidate's name and parents' names are filled exactly as in Date of Birth proof; name mismatch requires notarized affidavit at time of filling the online application.
  • For multiple posts - apply separately for each post and mention item numbers and order of preference in each application.
  • Do not change registered mobile number or Email after application - vital information about eligibility/shortlisting/selection status will be intimated through Email/SMS only.
  • Only locked/finalised applications shall be considered - no correction will be allowed after final submission. Preview application with all uploaded documents before final submission.
  • The maximum file size of each document/certificate should not exceed 500 KB; uploaded documents must be legible/readable and not password protected.
  • Final Personal Interview will be held in-person at RAC, Delhi only - no online/virtual interview mode will be considered under any circumstances.
  • Candidates must score minimum 75% marks (75 out of 100) in Final Personal Interview for consideration for selection.
  • Selected candidates will have liability to serve anywhere in India including remote/field area locations as per Central Government Rules.
  • Canvassing in any form will disqualify the candidate.
  • RAC does not request for any payment at any stage of recruitment process except the application fee. No such demand should be entertained.
  • Any dispute will be subject to the Hon'ble Courts/Tribunals having jurisdiction over Delhi only.
  • DRDO under DPDP Act 2023 declares that candidate's personal data received through online application will be processed for recruitment purpose only.
  • Incomplete applications will be summarily rejected.
  • The number of vacancies may vary; RAC reserves the right to modify the screening/shortlisting procedure depending upon availability of suitable candidates.

📄 Complete Details & Notification

Tamilnad Mercantile Bank Ltd. (TMB) Recruitment 2026 has been announced for Relationship Manager posts! Published on 22-05-2026 at the official website of TMB, this new recruitment drive invites applications from dynamic and result oriented individuals. Applicants with up to 35 years of age and possessing a Graduation or Post Graduation (First Class / 60% Marks) from a recognized University can apply online from 22-05-2026 to 06-06-2026. Find all details about the TMB Relationship Manager new vacancy 2026, including eligibility, online form, and notification PDF here.

FOLLOW US

Tamilnad Mercantile Bank Relationship Manager Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

Tamilnad Mercantile Bank Ltd., one of the leading old Private Sector Banks, has officially released Advertisement No. ADV_REM20262701 for engagement of Relationship Manager (in the rank of Manager / Assistant Manager) on a Regular Basis. The notification includes complete details on eligibility, roles & responsibilities, selection process, application fee, and application instructions. Candidates are strongly advised to read the full notification before applying. The notification is available on the official TMB website.

  • Download TMB Relationship Manager Recruitment 2026 Official Notification PDF

Tamilnad Mercantile Bank Relationship Manager Recruitment 2026 Overview

TMB is recruiting Relationship Manager posts (Manager / Assistant Manager cadre) with Graduation / Post Graduation (First Class) qualification, last date 06 June 2026.

Organization Name Tamilnad Mercantile Bank Ltd. (TMB)
Advertisement No. ADV_REM20262701
Post Name Relationship Manager (in the rank of Manager / Assistant Manager)
Department Tamilnad Mercantile Bank Ltd.
Total Vacancies Not specified (as per Bank's requirement)
Pay Scale / Stipend As per Bank norms (not specified in notification)
Job Type / Duration Regular Basis
Application Mode Online only (via TMB Careers portal)
Selection Mode Personal Interview (Direct / Video Conferencing)
Place of Posting Anywhere in India (Transferable)
Official Website https://www.ib.tmbonline.bank.in/tmb_careers/

TMB Relationship Manager Recruitment 2026 Important Dates

Event Date
Opening of Online Registration of Application 22-05-2026
Last Date for Online Registration of Application 06-06-2026
Age Calculated As On 30-04-2026
Interview Call Letter To be communicated individually by post / e-mail
Personal Interview Date To be notified (Direct / Video Conferencing)

TMB Relationship Manager Recruitment 2026 - Vacancy Details

Vacancies have been announced for Relationship Manager posts at the level of Manager and Assistant Manager. The number of vacancies has not been specified in the notification and will be filled as per the Bank's requirement. Posting will be anywhere in India and the job role and location are subject to transfer based on requirements.

Post Name Cadre Experience Required
Relationship Manager Manager At least 3 years of relevant experience in a Bank in sourcing / processing loans / MSME Loans / retail loans
Relationship Manager Assistant Manager At least 2 years of relevant experience in a Bank in sourcing / processing loans / MSME Loans / retail loans

TMB Relationship Manager Recruitment 2026 - Roles & Responsibilities

  • Build and maintain strong customer relationships
  • Acquire new customers and generate business opportunities
  • Promote banking products such as CASA, loans, insurance, and investment products
  • Achieve assigned sales and business targets
  • Cross-sell and upsell various banking products and services / Third Party Products
  • Provide excellent customer service and resolve customer queries
  • Handle customer portfolio management and relationship servicing
  • Ensure proper KYC compliance and documentation process
  • Coordinate with internal teams for smooth customer onboarding and service delivery
  • Conduct field visits and customer meetings for business development
  • Maintain regular follow-up with customers for retention and business growth
  • Stay updated with banking products, policies, and market trends
  • Assess Customer Background and Risk (CIBIL, CRILC, Acc. Aggregator)
  • Conduct Customer Property and Collateral Verification using Proplegit (in case of Home Loans)
  • Provide end-to-end banking services
  • Visit Accounts in SMA 0, 1, 2 and Update Status (to accompany Collection officer)
  • Any other duties assigned by the Bank from time to time

TMB Relationship Manager Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria

Candidates must fulfill all eligibility conditions as on the date of eligibility (30-04-2026). Only Indian Citizens are eligible to apply. Candidates should ensure they meet the experience and qualification criteria before applying. No vigilance case or adverse observation from RBI / Statutory Authority shall be pending against the candidate.

Criteria Details
Educational Qualification (as on 30-04-2026) Any Graduation or Post Graduation in First Class (60% Marks) in any discipline under regular stream from a recognized University.
Experience – Manager Cadre At least 3 years of relevant experience in a Bank in sourcing / Processing loans / MSME Loans / retail loans.
Experience – Assistant Manager Cadre At least 2 years of relevant experience in a Bank in sourcing / Processing loans / MSME Loans / retail loans.
Tenor / Nature of Job Regular Basis
Other Conditions No vigilance case or adverse observation from RBI / Statutory Authority shall be pending against the candidate.
Nationality Indian Citizens only.

TMB Relationship Manager Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit

Candidates must be not more than 35 years as on 30-04-2026. Age relaxation details, if any, are as per Bank's policy and Government of India guidelines.

Category Age Limit / Relaxation
General (UR) Not more than 35 years (as on 30-04-2026)
SC / ST / OBC / PwBD As per Government of India / Bank's guidelines (not separately specified in notification)

TMB Relationship Manager Recruitment 2026 - Application Fee

No application fee is required. The registration process is free of cost for all candidates.

Category Fees / Intimation Charges
All Categories NIL

TMB Relationship Manager Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process

Selection will be based on Personal Interview. Shortlisted candidates will be called for personal interview through Direct / Video Conferencing. The mode of interview, date and time will be communicated to eligible candidates individually by post / e-mail. The Bank reserves the right to reject any application or eliminate ineligible candidates at any point of time before, during or after the personal interview / selection. The decision of the Bank is final.

Stage 1 - Shortlisting of Applications

Applications will be scrutinized based on eligibility criteria. Shortlisted candidates will be communicated individually with interview details. No correspondence will be entertained regarding the shortlisting decision.

Stage 2 - Personal Interview (Direct / Video Conferencing)

Shortlisted candidates must appear for a personal interview. The mode (Direct / Video Conferencing), date and time will be communicated individually. Candidates are advised to keep their registered email ID and mobile number active throughout the process.

Tamilnad Mercantile Bank (TMB) Relationship Manager Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online

Tamilnad Mercantile Bank Ltd. (TMB) has released Advertisement No. ADV_REM20262701 for recruitment of Relationship Manager (in the rank of Manager / Assistant Manager) on regular basis. Online applications are invited from Indian citizens with Graduation or Post Graduation (First Class / 60% marks) and relevant banking experience. Apply online between 22-05-2026 and 06-06-2026 via the TMB Careers portal.

Apply Online at: https://www.ib.tmbonline.bank.in/tmb_careers/

Who should NOT apply for TMB Relationship Manager Recruitment 2026?

  • Candidates without at least 2 years (for Assistant Manager) or 3 years (for Manager) of relevant banking experience in loan sourcing / processing / MSME / retail loans.
  • Candidates who scored below 60% marks (Second Class or below) in their Graduation or Post Graduation degree.
  • Candidates above 35 years of age as on 30-04-2026.
  • Candidates who obtained their degree through correspondence / distance mode (only regular stream is eligible).
  • Candidates with any pending vigilance case or adverse observation from RBI / Statutory Authority.
  • Candidates not willing to be posted or transferred anywhere in India.
  • Candidates looking for a fixed-location posting; the role is explicitly transferable across India.

Common mistakes / What to check before applying TMB Relationship Manager Recruitment 2026?

  • Uploading a photograph in incorrect dimensions (must be 390 x 520 pixels, max 120 KB); non-compliant photos may lead to rejection at scrutiny.
  • Signing in capital letters - capital letter signatures are explicitly NOT accepted; upload a cursive/normal signature (240 x 240 pixels, max 60 KB).
  • Not noting the unique Registration Number and Password received on mobile after registration; without this candidates cannot proceed further in the application.
  • Applying without the activation link verification from the registered email ID; the application will not be complete without this step.
  • Uploading incomplete enclosures - all four documents (SSLC/12th mark sheet, Degree certificate, Experience certificates & Relieving Letters, Last Month Salary Slip) must be uploaded (max 250 KB each).
  • Using an inactive or incorrect email ID / mobile number, causing failure to receive activation link, registration details, or interview call letter.
  • Misspelling name or father's/husband's name in the application - any mismatch with certificates may result in disqualification.
  • Applying without reading the full notification PDF and checking experience eligibility carefully for the respective cadre (Manager vs. Assistant Manager).

How to Apply for TMB Relationship Manager Recruitment 2026

Candidates shall apply online only; no other mode of application will be accepted. Before applying, candidates should go through the detailed advertisement by clicking "Download Advertisement" available under "Recruitment Advertisement – Relationship Manager" on the TMB careers website. Candidates must have a valid personal email ID and contact number which should be kept active till completion of this recruitment project.

Documents Required to be Scanned and Uploaded (max 250 KB each):

  • Recent photograph with dimension of 390 x 520 pixels (preferred), max 120 KB (JPEG/JPG)
  • Signature (NOT in capital letters) with dimension of 240 x 240 pixels (preferred), max 60 KB
  • Self-attested photocopy of SSLC or Higher Secondary Mark Sheet / Transfer Certificate (for age proof)
  • Self-attested photocopy of Degree Certificate/s
  • Experience certificate/s and Relieving Letter for previous employments
  • Last Month Salary Slip

Documents to be Produced at the time of Interview / Selection:

  • Interview Call Letter (communicated by post / e-mail) along with valid photo identity proof in original and self-attested photocopy
  • Original and photocopies of all educational qualification certificates and marksheets (Graduation / Post Graduation)
  • Original Experience certificates and Relieving Letters from previous employers
  • Original Last Month Salary Slip
  • Any other documents as required by the Bank

Apply Online at: https://www.ib.tmbonline.bank.in/tmb_careers/

Important Instructions for TMB Relationship Manager Recruitment 2026 Candidates

  • Applications with incorrect / incomplete particulars or without required certificates attached are liable to be rejected.
  • The Bank reserves the right to reject any application without assigning any reason; Bank's decision in the matter of eligibility, interview and selection will be final.
  • The Bank reserves the right to eliminate ineligible candidates at any point of time before, during or after the personal interview / selection.
  • The posting will be at Anywhere in India; the job role and location are subject to transfer based on requirements.
  • Canvassing in any form will be a disqualification.
  • The online application must be submitted on or before 06-06-2026.
  • Candidates should note their unique Registration Number and Password for future reference - failure to do so will prevent them from proceeding further.
  • A copy of the system-generated online application form will be sent to the registered email ID; candidates should take a printout for future reference.
  • Any information found to be wrong or any candidate found ineligible at any stage of the process or later will result in disqualification.
  • No correspondence regarding shortlisting, interview, or selection decisions will be entertained by the Bank.

Key Highlights

  • Vacancy: AAICLAS is recruiting 62 Assistant (Security) personnel on a 3-Year Fixed Term Contract across 5 airport locations on PAN India basis.
  • Qualification: Candidates must have passed 12th (Senior Secondary) from a recognised Board/University/Institution with minimum 60% marks for General and 55% for SC/ST candidates.
  • Important Dates: Online applications open from 11 June 2026 and close on 02 July 2026.
  • Salary: Consolidated pay of ₹21,500/- (Year 1), ₹22,000/- (Year 2), and ₹22,500/- (Year 3), inclusive of all allowances.
  • Selection: Online Application Screening → Online Interaction (Interview) based on merit (higher graduation percentage called first).
  • Age Limit: Maximum 27 years as on 01.06.2026; relaxations applicable for SC/ST (5 years), OBC-NCL (3 years), and Ex-Servicemen (5 years).
  • Apply Mode: Online only through AAICLAS official website www.aaiclas.aero.
  • Job Location: Tirupati, Trichy, Madurai, Bhubaneswar, Udaipur (transferable to any location in India at AAICLAS Management's discretion).

AAI Cargo Logistics and Allied Services Company Limited (AAICLAS), a 100% subsidiary of Airports Authority of India (AAI), has released Advertisement No. 02 of 2026 dated 13.05.2026 for the engagement of Assistant (Security) on a Fixed Term Contract of 3 years on PAN India basis. A total of 62 vacancies have been announced across five airport locations — Tirupati, Trichy, Madurai, Bhubaneswar, and Udaipur.

AAICLAS has been set up to manage the development of air cargo business at airports and is a professionally driven service enterprise with a vision to emerge as the largest integrated cargo logistics and ground handling operator in the country. Candidates who are not willing to serve on All India Basis need not apply. The online application window has now been activated and eligible candidates can apply through the AAICLAS official website.

Candidates can download the official notification PDF and apply online through the direct links provided below in this article.

FOLLOW US

AAICLAS Assistant (Security) Recruitment 2026 Notification Out

Candidates should download and read the AAICLAS Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below.

  • Download AAICLAS Assistant (Security) Recruitment 2026 Official Notification PDF

AAICLAS Assistant (Security) Recruitment 2026 Overview

Organization Name AAI Cargo Logistics and Allied Services Company Limited (AAICLAS) - A 100% subsidiary of Airports Authority of India (AAI)

Post Name Assistant (Security)

Total Vacancies 62 (tentative; subject to increase or decrease as per operational requirement)
Remuneration ₹21,500/- (Year 1) | ₹22,000/- (Year 2) | ₹22,500/- (Year 3) - Consolidated, inclusive of all

AAICLAS Assistant (Security) Recruitment 2026 - Vacancy Details

A total of 62 vacancies (tentative) have been announced across 5 airport locations. The number of vacancies is subject to change at the sole discretion of AAICLAS Management. Candidates can apply for a single location only.

Sl. No. Airport / Place of Posting No. of Vacancies Last Date of Online Application
1 Tirupati 09 02.07.2026
2 Trichy 23
3 Madurai 09
4 Bhubaneswar 09
5 Udaipur 12
Total 62  

*The place of posting can be changed to any other location within India due to operational or administrative requirements at the sole discretion of AAICLAS Management, which shall be binding on the selected candidates.

AAICLAS Assistant (Security) Recruitment 2026 - Post-wise Eligibility Criteria

Candidates must fulfil all eligibility conditions as on the cut-off date 01.06.2026. Only Indian citizens are eligible to apply.

Assistant (Security)

Criteria Details
Essential Educational Qualification 12th (Senior Secondary) from any recognised Board/University/Institution with minimum 60% marks for General category and 55% marks for SC/ST candidates. Percentage must be entered in numeric form only (e.g. 60, 70, 80) in the online application — not in CGPA or any other format.
Language Proficiency Ability to read/speak English, Hindi and/or conversant with local language.
Job Profile Assistance in operational works at Airport, assistance to passenger baggage handling, loading and unloading of baggage, operation of X-ray machine, conveyor belt handling, and other multi-tasking operational work activities as assigned from time to time. The work involves lifting of baggage; candidates not willing to perform such work need not apply.

AAICLAS Assistant (Security) Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit

Upper age limit is 27 years as on 01.06.2026. Age relaxations are applicable as per Government rules. The date of birth as recorded in Matriculation/Secondary Examination certificate will only be accepted.

Category Age Relaxation
General / EWS Maximum 27 years as on 01.06.2026
SC / ST 5 years relaxation (Maximum 32 years)
OBC (Non-Creamy Layer) 3 years relaxation (Maximum 30 years)
Ex-Servicemen 5 years relaxation
Note All relaxations subject to submission of valid certificate issued by appropriate government authority.

AAICLAS Assistant (Security) Recruitment 2026 - Application Fee

Category Application Fee

SC / ST, EWS & Women ₹100/- (Rupees One Hundred only) - Excluding bank charges & other taxes
Payment Mode Online only - Net Banking / Credit Card / Debit Card / UPI / Wallet
Note Bank charges/commission applicable for the selected mode of payment shall be borne by the candidate. Fee once paid shall not be refunded under any circumstances.

AAICLAS Assistant (Security) Recruitment 2026 Online Link Activated

The online application link for AAICLAS Assistant (Security) Recruitment 2026 (Advertisement No. 02 of 2026) has been officially activated on 11 June 2026. Eligible candidates can now visit the official AAICLAS website at www.aaiclas.aero, navigate to the "Career" section, and click on "Apply Now" against Advertisement No. 02 of 2026 to submit their online applications. The last date to apply is 02 July 2026. No applications will be accepted after the closing date, and applications submitted through Speed Post, Registered Post, Ordinary Post, or Couriers will not be accepted under any circumstances. Candidates are advised to apply well before the deadline to avoid last-minute technical issues.

  • Apply Online - AAICLAS Assistant (Security) Recruitment 2026 (Link Activated)

AAICLAS Assistant (Security) Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process

Stage 1 - Application Screening

Online applications will be screened based on eligibility criteria. Candidates with higher percentage of marks at Graduation level will be called first for the online interaction in a phased manner, subject to availability of vacancies at the particular station/location.

Stage 2 - Online Interaction (Interview)

Eligible candidates will be called for an online interaction. The date, time, and venue/mode will be intimated through registered Email ID and by uploading a circular on the AAICLAS website www.aaiclas.aero. Selection will be done according to the merit list prepared on the basis of marks secured in the interview. Merely appearing in the interview does not reserve any right for selection.

Note: No TA/DA or reimbursement shall be made by AAICLAS for appearing in the selection process.

AAICLAS Assistant (Security) Recruitment 2026 - Emoluments / Pay Scale

Period Emoluments (Consolidated, Inclusive of All)
First Year ₹21,500/- Fixed
Second Year ₹22,000/- Fixed
Third Year ₹22,500/- Fixed

Additional benefits include:

  • TA/DA/Lodging & Boarding (if deputed on tour) equivalent to actual fare by Ordinary Public Bus or Train fare of Sleeper Class.
  • Leave: Privilege Leave - 18 days per year + 12 Half Pay Leave + 9 Casual Leave + 2 Restricted Holidays.
  • Medical Insurance reimbursement of maximum ₹10,000/- per annum for self and dependent family members on production of certified tax invoice/receipt.
  • Gratuity as per Gratuity Act, if/as applicable.

How to Apply for AAICLAS Assistant (Security) Recruitment 2026

Candidates must apply online only through the AAICLAS official website www.aaiclas.aero. No application through post, Speed Post, Registered Post, Ordinary Post, or Couriers will be accepted. Only a single application will be accepted from individual candidates and candidates can apply for a single location only.

Steps to Apply Online:

  • Visit www.aaiclas.aero → Click on "Career" column → Click on "Apply Now" against Advertisement No. 02 of 2026.
  • Fill in all details correctly. Percentage of marks of 12th must be entered in numeric form only (e.g. 60, 70, 80) — not in CGPA or any other format.
  • Upload required documents and pay the application fee online.
  • Ensure the Email ID entered in the application form remains active until the engagement process is completed. No change in Email ID will be allowed once entered.
  • Submit the application before 02.07.2026.

Documents Required to be Attached with the Online Application Form:

  • Senior Secondary (12th) Certificate and Mark Sheet
  • Caste/Category Certificate (if applicable)
  • Aadhaar Card Copy
  • Recent passport-size coloured photograph (maximum 20 KB size)
  • Application Fee (paid online)
  • Scanned Signature (maximum 20 KB size)

Documents to be Produced at the Time of Joining (if selected):

  • All original certificates/mark sheets/experience certificates/professional qualification certificates/training certificates
  • Aadhaar Card and PAN Card (originals)
  • Police Clearance Certificate (PCC)
  • Category Certificate (if applicable)
  • NOC from present employer (mandatory for candidates working in Government Department/PSU/Autonomous Body)
  • One set of self-attested copy of each document

Apply Online at: www.aaiclas.aero → Career → Advertisement No. 02 of 2026 → Apply Now

For queries: Email - [email protected] (mention Advertisement No. and name of position applied for in subject line). Helpdesk Number: 011-24667781.

Also Read: DRDO RAC Scientist Recruitment 2026 Notification Out  for 33 Scientist C, Scientist D and More Posts

AAICLAS Assistant (Security) Recruitment 2026 - Important Instructions

  • Only Indian citizens are eligible to apply. Candidates must necessarily produce relevant documents pertaining to nationality, age, and educational qualifications in original at the time of joining.
  • All eligibility criteria - age and qualification - are reckoned as on 01.06.2026.
  • Only a single application will be accepted from individual candidates. Candidates can apply for a single location only.
  • The place of posting can be changed to any other location within India at the sole discretion of AAICLAS Management, which shall be binding.
  • In case of closure of any AAICLAS station, the individual has to complete his/her contract at another station as per the company's requirement.
  • The FTC is initially for 3 years; the first year will be treated as probation. Extension or fresh contract will be at the sole discretion of AAICLAS Management, subject to satisfactory performance.
  • The contract can be terminated earlier at the discretion of Management during its validity in case of unsatisfactory performance or due to security concerns at the duty point.
  • Notice period for resignation is a minimum of 3 months. Candidates resigning with immediate effect will not be issued an experience letter/verification and will have to deposit 3 months' salary in lieu of the notice period not served.
  • All communications regarding this recruitment will be made only through the registered Email ID of candidates and not by post. Candidates must regularly check their registered email.
  • Any wrong/false information furnished by the candidate at any stage will result in cancellation of candidature without assigning any reason. If detected after engagement, the engagement will be treated as cancelled and necessary recovery will be made.
  • Candidates working in any Government Department/PSU/Autonomous Body must produce a NOC from their present employer.
  • Any canvassing by or on behalf of the candidate or bringing political or other outside influence with regard to selection shall be considered as Disqualification.
  • AAICLAS will not bear any liability on account of service bond/salary/leave salary/pension contribution of previous employment of any candidate working in Central/State Government/Autonomous Body/PSU.
  • Any modifications/amendments related to this recruitment will be published on the AAICLAS website www.aaiclas.aero only.
  • AAICLAS reserves the right to restrict/enlarge/cancel the engagement in this selection process in part or full without issuing any further notice or assigning any reason whatsoever.
  • The decision of AAICLAS Management regarding eligibility, acceptance or rejection of applications, and mode of selection shall be final and binding on all candidates. No representation or correspondence will be entertained in this regard.

How to Apply for Sarkari Job Online 2026

  1. Find the right Sarkari Job: Use the vacancy table or sector links above on OnlyJobs. Filter by your qualification — 10th, 12th, Graduate, or Engineering. Check the last date and eligibility carefully.

  2. Read the official notification: Click on the job listing to open the official notification PDF. Read all eligibility conditions — age limit, educational qualification, experience, category relaxations.

  3. Visit the official recruitment website: Never apply through third-party sites. Use the direct official link provided on OnlyJobs. Look for "Apply Online" or "Register" on the official portal.

  4. Register / Create account: Sign up using your valid email ID and active mobile number. Keep your Aadhaar, bank account details, and email accessible.

  5. Fill the application form: Enter personal details, educational qualifications, category (General/OBC/SC/ST/EWS), address, and other required information accurately.

  6. Upload documents: Scan and upload recent passport-size photograph, signature, 10th certificate (for DOB proof), educational certificates, caste certificate (if applicable). Check file size and format (JPG/PDF as specified).

  7. Pay application fee: Pay via Net Banking, UPI, Debit/Credit Card as applicable. Some categories (SC/ST/PwD/Women) may be exempted from fee. Keep the payment receipt.

  8. Submit and save confirmation: Review all details before final submission. After submitting, download the application printout / PDF confirmation with your registration number. Store it safely for admit card, exam, and future reference.

Why Sarkari Job? Benefits of Government Employment in India

Job Security
Permanent employment — cannot be terminated without due process. Lifelong career stability.
7th Pay Commission Salary
Fixed salary + DA, HRA, TA allowances. DA revised every 6 months. Regular pay revisions.
Medical Benefits
Free or subsidised medical treatment for employee and family under CGHS / state health schemes.
Housing Benefits
Government quarters (where available) or HRA (8–27% of basic pay). No private rent worries.
Pension (NPS / OPS)
Post-retirement monthly pension under NPS or OPS (state-specific). Financial security after service.
Work-Life Balance
Fixed working hours. Paid casual, medical, earned leave. National and state holidays. No overtime culture.
Career Growth
Regular promotions through DPC, ACR-based upgrades, MACP benefits (3 financial upgrades guaranteed).
Children's Education Allowance
Reimbursement of children's school fees (₹2,812/month per child up to 2 children, revised periodically).

Frequently Asked Questions – Sarkari Job 2026

What is Sarkari Job (सरकारी नौकरी)?

Sarkari Job (सरकारी नौकरी) refers to government employment in India — jobs offered by central government departments, state governments, public sector undertakings (PSUs), banks, railways, defence forces, and other government-funded organisations. These jobs offer permanent employment, fixed salary as per 7th Pay Commission, pension, medical benefits, and unmatched job security.

How to find Sarkari Job vacancy 2026 online?

To find online Sarkari Job vacancies in 2026: (1) Visit OnlyJobs daily for updated notifications. (2) Filter by your qualification — 10th, 12th, Graduate, PG. (3) Filter by sector — Railway, Banking, SSC, Defence, State PSC, Teaching. (4) Check last dates carefully. (5) Apply through the official department website using the direct link provided. Enable push notifications on OnlyJobs for instant alerts.

What Sarkari Job can I get after 10th pass?

After 10th pass, you can apply for: Railway Group D (RRB), Indian Army Soldier posts, Postal Mail Guard, SSC MTS / Havaldar, Constable GD, Anganwadi Worker/Helper, ITI Apprentice in PSUs (IOCL, HPCL, NTPC), MCL / Coal India posts, and various state government peon/chowkidar posts. Thousands of 10th pass Sarkari Job vacancies open every year.

What is the salary in Sarkari Job 2026?

Sarkari Job salary in 2026 follows the 7th Pay Commission: Group D / MTS: ₹22,000–₹26,000/month. Clerk / Group C: ₹32,000–₹48,000/month. Officer Grade (SSC CGL, Bank PO): ₹47,000–₹85,000/month. IAS/IPS (UPSC): ₹56,100–₹1,44,200 basic pay + DA, HRA, TA, medical and other allowances. State government salaries vary by state pay commission.

Which Bharat Sarkari Job has the most vacancies in 2026?

The largest Bharat Sarkari Job recruitments in 2026 include: Indian Army Agniveer (40,000+ posts), RRB Group D (22,000+ posts), SSC CGL (14,582 posts), SSC MTS (10,000+ posts), UP Police Constable (multiple), Bihar Police (multiple), IBPS Clerk (8,000+ posts), and various state PSC recruitments. Total active sarkari vacancies in India exceed 52,920 as of March 2026.

What is the best website to find Sarkari Job in India?

OnlyJobs is India's most trusted portal for Sarkari Job notifications since 2011, serving over 10 million users. Official direct sources include: ssc.nic.in (SSC), indianrailways.gov.in (Railways), upsc.gov.in (UPSC), ibps.in (Banking), and respective state PSC websites. OnlyJobs aggregates all official notifications in one place with direct apply links.

How to apply for Sarkari Job online in 2026?

To apply for Sarkari Job online: (1) Read official notification PDF. (2) Check eligibility. (3) Visit official recruitment website. (4) Register with email/mobile. (5) Fill application form. (6) Upload photo, signature, and certificates. (7) Pay fee via Net Banking/UPI/Debit card. (8) Submit and lication confirmation. Save the registration number for admit card and future reference.

What are the benefits of Sarkari Job in India?

Key benefits: (1) Lifelong job security. (2) 7th Pay Commission salary + DA revised biannually. (3) HRA (8–27% of basic). (4) Medical benefits (CGHS). (5) Pension under NPS/OPS. (6) Paid leave — casual, earned, medical. (7) Gratuity after 5 years. (8) Children's education allowance. (9) Fixed working hours and work-life balance. (10) Prestige and social recognition in Indian society.

What is the age limit for Sarkari Job?

Age limits vary by post: Group D (18–25 years), SSC CGL (18–32 years), Bank PO (20–30 years), UPSC Civil Services (21–32 years), Defence Agniveer (17.5–23 years). Age relaxations: SC/ST — 5 years, OBC — 3 years, PwD — 10 years, Ex-Servicemen — 3 years (general), Government servants — up to 5 years. Always verify in the official notification for each post.

What is Bharat Sarkari Job?

Bharat Sarkari Job means government job opportunities across the entire country of India (Bharat) — spanning central and state government vacancies across all 28 states and 8 union territories. The term emphasises pan-India coverage. OnlyJobs covers all Bharat Sarkari Job notifications from UPSC, SSC, Railways, Banking, Defence, state PSCs, and all other government departments.

About OnlyJobs 2026

OnlyJobs (Government Jobs) are highly sought-after employment opportunities in India. These positions offer job security, good salary packages, allowances, and retirement benefits. Our platform provides comprehensive information about all types of government vacancies including:

  • Central Government Jobs: UPSC, SSC, Railway, Banking, Defence, PSUs

Frequently Asked Questions - OnlyJobs 2026

Q1: What is the eligibility for OnlyJobs?

Eligibility varies by position. Generally, candidates need to be Indian citizens aged 18-35 years (with age relaxation for reserved categories). Educational qualifications range from 10th pass to post-graduation depending on the job.

Q2: How to prepare for Government Job exams?

Preparation includes understanding the exam pattern, studying from standard books, practicing previous year papers, taking mock tests, and staying updated with current affairs. Focus on subjects like General Knowledge, Reasoning, Quantitative Aptitude, and English.

Q3: Which are the best Government Jobs in 2026?

Top government jobs include IAS/IPS (UPSC), Bank PO, SSC CGL, Railway Group A & B, Defence Services, PSU Jobs, State PCS, and Teaching positions. These offer excellent career growth, job security, and benefits.

Q4: What is the application process for OnlyJobs?

The process typically involves: 1) Online registration on the official website, 2) Filling application form, 3) Uploading documents (photo, signature, certificates), 4) Payment of application fee, 5) Downloading admit card, 6) Appearing for examination, 7) Document verification if selected.

Q5: How often are new OnlyJobs notifications released?

New government job notifications are released daily. Major recruitments like UPSC, SSC, IBPS have annual calendars, while state governments and PSUs release notifications throughout the year. We update our portal daily with 911+ active job listings.

Candidates can check state-wise and district-wise Anganwadi vacancy lists, eligibility, qualifications, age limit, salary, and online application dates, and download the Anganwadi Application Form 2026. Anganwadi Worker Salary / Honorarium 2026

Anganwadi Workers and Helpers receive a monthly honorarium (not a salary), which includes a Central Government component and an additional State Government component. The table below shows the total honorarium per month for key states in 2026.

Selection Process for Anganwadi Recruitment 2026

There is no written examination for Anganwadi Worker and Helper posts. Selection is merit-based on academic qualifications. For Supervisor and CDPO posts, a written exam or interview may be conducted.

How to Apply for Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 Online

  • Visit the official portal: Go to your state's official WCD / ICDS website or the direct link provided in the vacancy table above. For central information, visit wcd.nic.in.
  • Find the recruitment notification: Click on the "Recruitment" or "Anganwadi Recruitment 2026" section.
  • Download and read the notification: Download and read the official notification PDF carefully before applying.
  • Register / Login: Create a new account using your mobile number and Aadhaar. If already registered, log in with your credentials.
  • Fill the application form: Enter personal details, educational qualification, address, and select your preferred district/ward. Ensure you apply only for a ward where you are a permanent resident.
  • Upload documents: Upload scanned copies of your passport-size photograph, signature, 10th/12th marksheet, Aadhaar card, and any caste/domicile certificate if required.
  • Review and submit: Check all entries carefully before final submission. Download and print the application confirmation / acknowledgement slip for your records.

Documents Required for Anganwadi Application

  • Aadhaar Card (Mandatory)
  • 10th Marksheet & Certificate
  • 12th Marksheet (for AWW)
  • Graduation Certificate (Supervisor)
  • Domicile / Residence Certificate
  • Caste Certificate (SC/ST/OBC)
  • Passport-size Photograph
  • Signature (scanned)
  • EWS Certificate (if applicable)
  • PwD Certificate (if applicable)

About this page: Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 information is compiled by the OnlyJobs editorial team directly from official state WCD / ICDS recruitment notifications. We verify all vacancy details, eligibility, and last dates before publishing. Page is updated daily as new notifications are released. For any discrepancy, always refer to the official notification PDF linked in the apply column above.

Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 – FAQ's

How to apply for Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 online?

Visit your state's official WCD / ICDS portal (link provided in table above). Register with mobile & Aadhaar, fill the application form, upload documents (photo, 10th certificate, Aadhaar, domicile), and submit before the last date. Print the application acknowledgement slip after submission.

What is the eligibility for Anganwadi Worker 2026?

Candidates must have passed 10th or 12th standard from a recognized board. Age limit is 18–35 years (varies by state). Must be a permanent resident of the ward/village for which vacancy exists. Only female candidates are eligible for Worker and Helper posts.

What is the salary of Anganwadi Worker in 2026?

Anganwadi Worker receives a monthly honorarium of ₹10,000–₹20,000 depending on the state (Karnataka and TN are highest at ~₹14,000). Anganwadi Helper gets ₹5,000–₹7,000/month. The Central Government pays ₹4,500/month as base honorarium, and states add their own component on top.

Is there a written exam for Anganwadi jobs?

No, there is no written examination for Anganwadi Worker and Anganwadi Helper posts. Selection is purely merit-based on academic qualification marks (10th / 12th percentage). For Supervisor / CDPO posts, a written exam or interview may be conducted depending on the state.

What is the age limit for Anganwadi Helper?

Age limit is 18 to 35 years as of 1st January 2026 in most states. SC/ST candidates get 5 years relaxation (maximum age 40). OBC candidates get 3 years relaxation (maximum age 38). PwD candidates get additional relaxation as per state rules.

What documents are required for Anganwadi job application?

Required documents: Aadhaar card, 10th/12th marksheet and certificate, domicile/residence certificate, caste certificate (SC/ST/OBC), passport-size photograph, scanned signature, and EWS/PwD certificate if applicable. Graduation certificate is needed for Supervisor post applications.

What is ICDS recruitment 2026?

ICDS stands for Integrated Child Development Services - the government programme under which Anganwadi centres operate nationwide. ICDS recruitment 2026 refers to hiring of Anganwadi Workers, Helpers, Supervisors, and CDPOs by state WCD departments under the Ministry of Women & Child Development (wcd.nic.in).

Is Anganwadi Worker a permanent government job?

Anganwadi Workers and Helpers are honorary workers, not regular government employees. They receive a fixed monthly honorarium (not salary) and are entitled to benefits like ESI, health insurance, and maternity benefits. Supervisors and CDPOs are regular government employees in most states and receive full pay & grade pay.

Can I apply for Anganwadi job from a different district?

No. Anganwadi Workers and Helpers must be permanent residents of the same ward/village/district where the vacancy exists. A domicile or residence certificate is mandatory. Applications from outside the specified locality are rejected. For Supervisor/CDPO posts, the same district residency rule generally applies.

Here you can find state-wise forest department notifications with vacancy, qualification, eligibility, selection process, salary and application last date in one place.

Forest Department Posts List

Forest departments work with a clear hierarchy from senior Indian Forest Service officers to field-level staff like Forest Guard and Forest Watcher. Understanding these posts helps candidates know growth opportunities and career progression in forest services.

  • Principal Chief Conservator of Forests (PCCF) / Head of Forest Force
  • Additional Principal Chief Conservator of Forests (APCCF) / Additional Chief Conservator of Forests
  • Chief Conservator of Forests (CCF)
  • Conservator of Forests (CF)
  • Deputy Conservator of Forests (DCF) / Divisional Forest Officer (DFO)
  • Assistant Conservator of Forests (ACF)
  • Forest Range Officer (FRO) / Range Forest Officer (RFO)
  • Deputy Forest Ranger / Forest Inspector
  • Section Forest Officer / Forester / Van Daroga
  • Beat Forest Officer / Beat Guard / Forester Grade I
  • Forest Guard / Van Rakshak
  • Forest Watcher / Forest Worker / Plantation Worker
  • Forest Ranger (in states where used separately)
  • Field Guard

Most forest department recruitment notifications on this page focus on Forest Guard, Forester, Forest Range Officer, Field Guard and similar Group B, C and D posts.

Eligibility for Forest Department Jobs

Eligibility for forest department jobs depends on the post, state and recruitment authority. Below is a general idea of qualification and age for popular posts like Forest Guard, Forester and Forest Range Officer. Candidates should always check the official notification for detailed eligibility criteria.

Education Qualification for Forest Guard, Forester, Ranger

  • Forest Guard / Field Guard / Forest Watcher / Beat Guard: Usually 10th pass or 12th pass from a recognized board, knowledge of local language, and basic physical standards as per state rules.
  • Forester / Section Forest Officer / Deputy Forest Ranger: Generally 12th pass or graduate in any stream or science-related subjects, with physical standards and sometimes driving or technical skills depending on the post.
  • Forest Range Officer (RFO) / Forest Ranger / ACF: Normally graduate degree in Science, Agriculture, Forestry, Environmental Science, Engineering or related disciplines, with higher physical standards and sometimes a competitive exam similar to state PCS level.
  • IFS / Indian Forest Service and senior posts (DCF, CF, CCF, PCCF): Filled through UPSC Indian Forest Service Examination and promotions, requiring a graduate degree and all-India competitive selection.

Age Limit & Relaxation

  • Forest Guard / Forester / Field Guard: Minimum age is usually 18 years and maximum age is around 27–30 years, with age relaxation for SC, ST, OBC, EWS, Ex-servicemen and other categories as per government rules.
  • Forest Range Officer / ACF and higher competitive posts: Age limit often ranges from 21 to 32 years (varies by recruitment), with relaxations for reserved categories.
  • Exact age limit, cut-off date and relaxation details always depend on the particular notification, so candidates should verify from the official advertisement before applying.

Forest Department Jobs Salary Overview

Forest department salary depends on the post, pay level, state and allowances. Senior officers under Indian Forest Service receive higher pay levels, while Forest Guard, Forester and similar posts fall under state government pay matrices.

Post Pay Level Basic Pay Gross Salary (Approx) Category
Forest Guard / Van Rakshak / Vana Palaka Level 3 ₹21,700 ₹28,000 – ₹35,000 Group C
Forester / Forest Sub-Inspector Level 6 ₹35,400 ₹45,000 – ₹56,000 Group C
Forest Beat Officer / Beat Guard / Junior Ranger Level 4 ₹25,500 ₹33,000 – ₹42,000 Group C
Forest Range Officer (FRO) / Ranger Level 10 ₹56,100 ₹70,000 – ₹90,000 Group B
Assistant Conservator of Forests (ACF) Level 10 ₹56,100 ₹75,000 – ₹95,000 Group B

Additional PCCF (Addl. PCCF) Level 15 ₹1,82,200 ₹2,10,000 – ₹2,20,000 IFS Cadre
Principal Chief Conservator (PCCF / HoFF) Level 17 ₹2,25,000 ₹2,25,000 (fixed) Apex Scale

Selection Process & Exam Pattern

The selection process for Forest Department Jobs 2026 typically includes written examinations, physical tests and document verification. Some posts also conduct medical examination and walking tests due to the demanding nature of field duties.

Written Exam, PET/PST & Document Verification

  • Written Exam: Most Forest Guard, Forester and Forest Range Officer recruitments start with a written exam based on objective-type questions (MCQs).
  • PET / PST (Physical Efficiency Test / Physical Standard Test): Candidates who qualify written exam are called for running, walking test, height, chest measurement and other physical parameters as per post and gender.
  • Document Verification: Shortlisted candidates must produce original certificates of age, qualification, caste, residence, sports/NCC and other documents mentioned in the notification.
  • Medical Examination: Many forest posts require medical fitness to ensure candidates can perform field duties in forests, wildlife areas and difficult terrain.

Syllabus Highlights for Forest Guard & Ranger

Typical syllabus for written exam may include:

  • General Knowledge & Current Affairs (national, state-level, environment and forest-related topics)
  • General Hindi / English or regional language (grammar, comprehension, vocabulary)
  • General Mathematics / Quantitative Aptitude (up to 10th or 12th level)
  • General Science and Environmental Studies (forest, wildlife, biodiversity, conservation, climate, basic biology)
  • Reasoning Ability (logical and analytical reasoning)

Exact subject-wise marks, number of questions, negative marking and exam duration will be given in the respective forest department notification.

How to Apply for Forest Department Jobs 2026

Most Forest Department Jobs 2026 applications are accepted either online through official websites or offline via prescribed application forms. Candidates should carefully read the official notification before filling the form.

Online Application Process

  1. Visit the official website of the recruiting body (State Forest Department, State PSC, Staff Selection Board or other government portal).
  2. Find the latest link for Forest Guard / Forester / Forest Range Officer / other forest posts and open the detailed advertisement.
  3. Complete the registration process with basic details like name, mobile number, email ID and verify using OTP if required.
  4. Fill the online application form with personal, educational, address and category information exactly as per documents.
  5. Upload scanned copies of photograph, signature and other certificates in the prescribed format and size.
  6. Pay the application fee online through Net Banking, Debit Card, Credit Card or UPI as per your convenience.
  7. Finally, submit the form and take a printout or PDF of the submitted application and payment receipt for future reference.

Documents Required & Application Fee

  • Recent passport size photograph and signature (scanned)
  • Class 10th and 12th mark sheets and certificates
  • Degree / Diploma certificates for graduate-level posts
  • Caste / Category certificate (SC, ST, OBC, EWS, etc.)
  • Domicile / Residence certificate if required by the state
  • NCC, Sports, Ex-serviceman and other quota certificates if applicable
  • Valid ID proof (Aadhaar Card, PAN, Voter ID, Driving Licence, Passport, etc.)

Why Choose Forest Department Jobs?

Forest department jobs are popular among candidates who love nature, wildlife and field work. These jobs offer job security, government benefits and a chance to work in forest conservation, wildlife protection, eco-tourism and community development.

  • Stable government job with regular salary, pension/NPS and allowances
  • Opportunity to work in forests, wildlife sanctuaries, national parks and protected areas
  • Contribution to environment protection, afforestation and biodiversity conservation
  • Good promotion avenues from Forest Guard to Forester, Forest Range Officer and higher posts in many states.

Indian Navy Agniveer (Apprentice) Online Form 2026

📅 Updated: 02 Jun 2026 ✍️ By: OnlyJobs Editorial Team 🌐 Source: Official Notification

Check complete details for Indian Navy Agniveer (Apprentice) Online Form 2026. Includes important dates, application link, eligibility, syllabus and result info — updated live on OnlyJobs.
